question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/repository/RegisteredNodeRepository.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: findByRegisteredNodeIdBetweenAndDeletedIsFalseAndTypeIs()] Can an unprivileged external user tamper with a REGISTEREDNODECREATE transaction to include a serviceEndpoints list with duplicate entries (same IP, port, type), causing the repository to store and return redundant endpoint data that inflates response sizes and confuses load-balancing logic in consumers?
